sglang.title: [SRT] Store Req input ids as arrays
sglang.author: mickqian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Store Req.origin_input_ids and Req.origin_input_ids_unpadded in array("q"), matching the existing decode output_ids representation.
Reduce Python list[int] overhead for long prompt inputs, especially multimodal requests with many padded image tokens.
Keep the existing unpadded-input fallbac

Accept precomputed VLM hashes, offsets, and MRoPE metadata.

sglang.title: [diffusion] Clean up VSA attention hot path
sglang.author: BBuf
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
This change cherry-picks the VSA/SLA hot-path cleanup pieces from FastVideo PR hao-ai-lab/FastVideo#1272, with SGLang-specific compatibility and validation follow-ups.
Summary

Reuse the VSA padded tile buffer across layer calls and precompute the untile gather index in metadata.
Remove redundant .c

sglang.title: [VLM] feat: replace small H2D calls with a single one for qwen-vl
sglang.author: mickqian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Avoid redundant host/device copies for Qwen VL preprocessed features.
Keep shared-memory tensor views alive until the materialized tensor is released.

Validation

pre-commit run --files python/sglang/srt/managers/mm_utils.py python/sglang/srt/models/qwen3_vl.py python/sglang/srt/multimodal

sglang.title: [VLM] avoid extra cuda-ipc staging for preprocessed input
sglang.author: mickqian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Avoid extra CUDA IPC staging for preprocessed VLM tensors.
Reconstruct CUDA IPC proxies once on the scheduler target device and reuse precomputed pad/hash for preprocessed items.

Benchmark
Qwen3.5-397B FP8 TP8 on non-CI B200 devbox, SMG gRPC CUDA IPC. SMG was source-built with a benchmark-

sglang.title: [observability] add ServerArgs.stat_loggers for pluggable metrics backend
sglang.author: nadongjun
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Implements item 1 of #24467.
The five *MetricsCollector classes in python/sglang/srt/observability/metrics_collector.py instantiate prometheus_client.Counter / Gauge / Histogram / Summary directly, locking the metrics backend at import time. Embedded users cannot swap the backend without

sglang.title: [UnifiedTree] fix: backup SWA-split parent before child under write-through
sglang.author: alphabetc1
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Fix a HiCache write_through regression in UnifiedRadixCache: when an insert spans the SWA eviction boundary, the SWA-split leaf was silently dropped from host backup and later deleted on device eviction (instead of being demoted to a host-only node), so subsequent requests for the same promp

sglang.title: [diffusion] Use model-aware VAE channels_last_3d policy
sglang.author: mickqian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Default SGLANG_DIFFUSION_VAE_CHANNELS_LAST_3D to auto instead of globally forcing true.
In auto, enable channels_last_3d only for QwenImage and single-GPU Wan/Wan variants.
Keep multi-GPU Wan, LTX, Hunyuan/FastHunyuan, Helios/Joy/MOVA on the false path unless explicitly overridden.
Keep exp

sglang.title: [dsv4] support eplb
sglang.author: SYChen123
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Support EPLB for deepseek v4 (with megaMoE disabled).
Modifications
Add the eplb context in the forward of DeepseekV4Model. Without the context, the layer_idx used in eplb distribution gatherer is None which causes crash in prefill node and stats inaccuracy issue in decode node.
Accuracy

sglang.title: fix(swa): downgrade translate_loc_from_full_to_swa key-change log from warning to debug
sglang.author: ch-wan
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The translate_loc_from_full_to_swa cache-miss message fires whenever two different tensors are translated in the same logical pass — e.g. page_table (in init_forward_metadata) followed by out_cache_loc (in set_kv_buffer), or after a radix-cache insert. This is expected behaviour given the

sglang.author: hnyls2002

Replace streaming vs regular session speedup assert (>= 1.4x on tail) with a streaming-only stability assert: tail_avg(last 10) / head_avg(first 10 after prefill) <= 1.15
Drop test_regular_session (cross-mode comparison no longer used)
Drop two unread fields on TurnResult (prompt_tokens, co

sglang.title: Clean up server startup log noise

sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Consolidate 5 template detection log lines into 1 summary line
Merge KV cache dtype + allocation logs into 1 line
Fix CUTLASS warning: "B200" → "SM100 GPUs", downgrade to info
Move max_total_num_tokens log after tree cache init for logical ordering
Downgrade ModelConfig init logs to debug (

sglang.title: Add --disable-attn-tp-gather opt-out for model-managed SP
sglang.author: minosfuture
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Some models manage sequence-parallel (SP) scatter/gather entirely at the model level — they issue their own all_gather/reduce_scatter inside attention and do not consume the upstream gathered_buffer. For those models the scheduler-side attn_tp_gather machinery is dead weight: it pads num_

sglang.title: [Test] split test/registered/distributed/ into topic folders
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Eliminate the catch-all test/registered/distributed/ folder; route each test to the topic folder that matches its actual subject (disaggregation / model loading / DP attention / DP engine / PP / unit). CI dispatch is unaffected — register_cuda_ci annotations live in-file, not in path.



Destination

In

eagle_worker_v2.verify then passed skip_attn_backend_init=True unconditionally, so the eventual forward_extend skipped re-ini

If encoder_only mode enbaled, there wouldn't be self.model in Qwen3VLMoeForConditionalGeneration, AttributeError  'Qwen3VLMoeForConditionalGeneration' object has no attribute 'model' would be thrown.
Modifications
Add hasattr to prevent self.model not existing.

sglang.title: [VLM] try to reuse precomputed padded input ids in scheduler instead of padding
sglang.author: mickqian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Reuse MultimodalInputs.padded_input_ids in scheduler when it matches the received multimodal input length.
Preserve session prefixes while avoiding repeated model-specific padding work.
Keep this PR scoped to scheduler consumption; producer-side support is already on main.

Late

Motivation
Faster KV-cache writes on CPU: replace slow index_put_ scatter for MHA with a dedicated row-copy kernel, matching the CUDA store_cache idea.
Modifications

sgl-kernel: Add store_cache_cpu (OpenMP parallel row copy); 3D tensors [B, H, D]; int32/int64 indices; dtypes fp16, bf16, uint8 (FP8

sglang.title: [Bug Fix][HiCache] TreeNode.get_prefix_hash_values @lru_cache can return mutated list
sglang.author: vuuihc
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
TreeNode.get_prefix_hash_values in both radix_cache.py and mamba_radix_cache.py was decorated with @lru_cache(maxsize=1), but the helper returns a mutable List[str].
That list can be passed as operation.prefix_keys into HiCache storage paths. Some of those paths extend prefix_keys in plac

sglang.author: Qiaolin-Yu
sglang.bodyExcerpt: FlashInferMLAMultiStepDraftBackend.{init_forward_metadata, init_forward_metadata_replay_cuda_graph} go through common_template, which launches the generate_draft_decode_kv_indices triton kernel and slices spec_info.kv_indptr/kv_indices for each draft step. Both are unnecessary for the trtllm_mla pat

fix correctness issue of GDN triton kernel for XPU for long sequence length.

Kernels in python/sglang/srt/hardware_backend/xpu/kernels/fla/chunk_delta_h.py and python/sglang/srt/hardware_backend/xpu/kernels/fla/chunk_fwd.py.

sglang.title: [lora] Fix overlap loading for cancelled requests
sglang.author: erikwijmans
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Currently events are only removed from lora_to_overlap_load_event when the scheduler actually schedules a request for that lora. If all requests from for that lora are cancelled before it is actually loaded, the load will never be reaped from lora_to_overlap_load_event. This has the impac

sglang.title: Fix missing idle-batch handling in prepare_mlp_sync_batch_raw
sglang.author: yuhuiaws
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Fix deadlock in DP attention + PD disaggregation decode mode caused by idle batch not being handled in prepare_mlp_sync_batch_raw()
One-line fix: add local_batch.forward_mode.is_idle() check to the existing condition

Problem
In DP=16 disagg decode, all 16 DP ranks must participate in all_g

vllm.title: Reduce memory usage for granite_speech.
vllm.author: Yihuki
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Replace torch.sum with torch.einsum to reduce memory usage in granite_speech. Original implementation used torch.sum used 10+G vram storing the full intermediate matrix for ibm-granite/granite-speech-4.1-2b.
Test Plan
